## Checklist (Definition of Done — see AGENTS.md)

- [ ] Tests added/updated and green (if `src/` changed); coverage holds
- [ ] `ruff` + `mypy` clean
- [ ] **`interview_packet.md` / `README.md` / `STATUS.md` updated per the Definition of Done**
- [ ] ADR added/updated for any major decision (and old one marked superseded)
- [ ] `docs/architecture.md` updated if architecture/components/cost changed
- [ ] No secrets in the diff; `.env.example` updated if config changed
- [ ] No instruction drift — restated facts agree across docs (tenet 10)
